title: T-021 — Python solver microservice scaffold (FastAPI)
prompt:
# T-021 — Python solver microservice scaffold (FastAPI)

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §1.4, §5.1.1, §5.4.1, §13.1, §13.2
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Scaffold isolated Python FastAPI microservice `services/planner-solver` with health endpoint, /solve POST stub, Postgres LISTEN consumer, Dockerfile, and circuit-breaker compatibility (returns 503 on unhealthy state).

## Implementation contract
1. New directory `services/planner-solver/`: `pyproject.toml`, `Dockerfile`, `app/main.py` (FastAPI), `app/listener.py` (Postgres LISTEN), `app/solve.py` (stub returning 200 with empty assignments).
2. Endpoints: GET /health (returns {status, db_connected, queue_depth}), POST /solve (body=run_id, returns 202 immediately + spawns background task).
3. Dockerfile multi-stage build, runs as non-root.
4. Tests: `services/planner-solver/tests/test_main.py` (pytest) + `services/planner-solver/tests/test_listener.py`.

## Files
- services/planner-solver/pyproject.toml [create]
- services/planner-solver/Dockerfile [create]
- services/planner-solver/app/main.py [create]
- services/planner-solver/app/listener.py [create]
- services/planner-solver/app/solve.py [create]
- services/planner-solver/tests/test_main.py [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given FastAPI service running, when GET /health called, then 200 returned with {status, db_connected, queue_depth} JSON shape
2. Given POST /solve with valid run_id, when called, then 202 returned immediately and background task spawned (test asserts non-blocking)
3. Given DB unreachable, when GET /health called, then 503 returned with status='unhealthy'

## Test strategy
- RED: write services/planner-solver/tests/test_main.py asserting health shape + /solve 202 + 503 on db down
- Run 'cd services/planner-solver && uv run pytest'

## Risk red lines
- Do not run solver as root inside container
- Do not block the request thread inside /solve (must spawn background task and return 202 immediately)
- Do not skip health endpoint (Kubernetes/circuit breaker depends on it)
